channel.title: Daily Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily podcast covering the latest in AI, tech, and developer tools from curated Twitter bookmarks.
channel.itunes:author: Daily Tech Insights
channel.itunes:subtitle: AI and Tech News Daily
channel.itunes:summary: Daily podcast covering the latest in AI, tech, and developer tools from curated Twitter bookmarks. Hosted by Alex and Jordan.

item.title: Daily Digest - March 1, 2026: 24/7 AI Assistants, Software Factories & The Rise of Generalists
item.description:
Today's Episode:

A comprehensive digest of 10 fascinating tweets covering the future of AI agents, software engineering, and knowledge work.

Topics Covered:

  • @LeoYe_AI on 24/7 AI Assistants - The shift from "visiting AI" to "living with AI" - AI agents that work while you sleep
  • @charlierguo on Harness Engineering - Engineering splitting into building the environment vs managing work. OpenAI's million-line product with 3 engineers in 5 months
  • @nlevine19 on Jevons' Paradox in Finance - How stablecoins reduce costs and increase market entry. Sling Money serving 70 countries with 23 people
  • @arscontexta on Company Knowledge Graphs - Everything is a context problem. Structured markdown as perfect AI context repositories
  • @gabrielchua on Skills Explained - Why markdown folders are so effective for AI agents. Progressive disclosure and formalized prompts
  • @froessell's Claude Code Skills - Practical skill examples: iOS design, UX research, App Niche Hunter
  • @ashpreetbedi on 5 Levels of Agentic Software - From agents with tools to full production systems
  • @thedankoe on Multiple Interests as Superpower - The death of the expert, rise of the generalist. Living through a second renaissance
  • @koylanai on Personal Brain OS - File system as database for AI agents. Progressive disclosure architecture
  • @chamath on Software Factory - AI-native orchestration layer with 5 stations: Refinery, Foundry, Planner, Validator, Knowledge Graph

Hosts: Alex (voice: alloy) & Jordan (voice: echo)

Generated using: OpenAI TTS (tts-1 model)

Duration: 12 minutes 34 seconds
item.itunes:author: Daily Tech Insights
item.itunes:summary: 24/7 AI Assistants, Harness Engineering, Jevons' Paradox in Finance, Knowledge Graphs, Agentic Software levels, and the Software Factory vision.

item.title: Daily Tech Insights - February 26, 2026
item.description:
Today's Topics:

  • Notion Workers + Custom Agents - Brian Lovin's experience building specialized agents for side projects
  • AI-Powered Creative Workflows - Cam Sackett's landing page built with Figma, Cursor AI, Krea AI, and more
  • OpenFangg OS - Open source operating system for AI agents (137k lines of Rust)
  • Hermes Agent - Nous Research's agent with multi-level memory system
  • AI Memory Management - Community solutions for persistent AI context

Hosts: Alex (Host A) & Jordan (Host B)

Generated using OpenAI TTS (voices: alloy & echo)
item.itunes:author: Daily Tech Insights
item.itunes:summary: Today's episode covers Notion Workers, OpenFangg OS, Hermes Agent, AI creative workflows, and memory management for AI agents.
